text:
Meet Varick’s Head of FDE, Daniel.

After breaking 2 world records in rowing at Cambridge, he joined Citadel Securities and went on to become COO of EMEA in just 2 years.

Now, he's leading our Forward Deployed team at Varick, and is looking for generational talent like yourself https://t.co/g9j0FtCJsP

Compliance is painful, bureaucratic, and often paper-based, so it has long persisted as being manual and human intensive.

That friction has historically made compliance a graveyard for startups.

But AI may finally go from "good enough to pilot" to "good enough to trust".

In https://t.co/uHlhAbTa9s
